title: 朝日杯FSの後に・燃ゆる炎

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O's eyes burn bright with passion
as she runs, and it is this moment that convinces
Yaeno Muteki she is a worthy foe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, Yaeno Muteki is training into the night,
and Sakura Chiyono O's own motivation
skyrockets upon seeing her working so hard.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky watches fondly as Sakura Chiyono O
is spurred on by her friend, all while carrying the
dream Maruzensky gave her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Mr. C.B., standing beside her, doesn't seem
pleased by the attitude she sees in Maruzensky's
gaze.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Sakura Chiyono O has yet to realize the
intention behind their distant stares. For now, all
she can do is prepare for the Satsuki Sho.
